subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, the King, the All-Glorious, Who hath manifested Us in the world of existence and taught Us praise and glorification in the unseen and visible realms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الملک المحمود الذی اظهرنا فی عالم الوجود و علمنا الحمد و الثناء فی الغیب و الشهود
